evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate an image provider comparison report.
assertions: JSON report contains rankingSurfaces.local and rankingSurfaces.service
service fastest and cheapest surfaces are populated when timing and cost exist
highest-quality surfaces are unavailable without explicit quality metrics
markdown has separate local and service sections

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate a music provider comparison report.
assertions: JSON report contains all six ranking surface arrays
highest-quality surfaces are unavailable without explicit quality metrics
markdown does not include a combined local-vs-service leaderboard

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate OCR provider comparison reports from the fixture run.
assertions: provider-comparison-report.md has separate Local Providers and Service Providers sections
provider-comparison-report.json contains all six ranking surface arrays
OCR highest-quality rankings use WER/CER evidence
local cheapest rankings use zero monetary cost
no combined local-vs-service ranked leaderboard remains

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate STT provider comparison reports from the fixture run.
assertions: reference-comparison-report.md has separate Local Providers and Service Providers sections
reference-comparison-report.json contains all six ranking surface arrays
STT highest-quality rankings use speaker-aware WER evidence
no combined local-vs-service ranked leaderboard remains

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate TTS provider comparison reports with existing roundtrip transcripts.
assertions: TTS highest-quality rankings use roundtrip WER when available
local and service cheapest rankings are separate
duration and file size are not used as quality proxies

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate URL provider comparison reports from the fixture run.
assertions: provider-comparison-report.md has separate Local Providers and Service Providers sections
provider-comparison-report.json contains all six ranking surface arrays
URL highest-quality rankings use WER/CER/coverage evidence
no combined local-vs-service ranked leaderboard remains

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate a video provider comparison report.
assertions: JSON report contains all six ranking surface arrays
highest-quality surfaces are unavailable without explicit quality metrics
markdown does not include a combined local-vs-service leaderboard
